---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for ntfsmac
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem or limitation you've run into.

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Which part of ntfsmac does this affect?

- [ ] CLI (`cli/`)
- [ ] GUI menu-bar app (`gui/`)
- [ ] Privileged helper (`helper/`)
- [ ] Build pipeline (`build/`)
- [ ] Docs

## Additional context

Note whether this fits within the project's non-negotiables (see
[CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)) — e.g. NFS-only transport, ad-hoc signing only, Apple
Silicon only, mount/unmount always through the SMJobBless helper. Requests that
conflict with these will need discussion before implementation.
